body.objective: Create at least 30 unique, train-disjoint holdout cases with broad governance-category coverage before any adapter promotion claim.
acceptance_criteria: The holdout contains at least 30 unique case IDs and no train case IDs.
The holdout covers at least eight governance categories.
Every mechanically checkable case has deterministic oracle evidence.

ordered_goals.title: Produce a measurable non-regressing training delta

body.objective: Improve paired post-training oracle performance above the recorded zero-pass baseline without numerical instability or increased over-refusal.
acceptance_criteria: Post-training oracle pass rate is greater than baseline on the untouched holdout.
Post-training over-refusal does not exceed baseline.
Dataset, model revision, adapter, and result hashes are recorded.

ordered_goals.title: Calibrate Djimitflo governance scoring against oracle anchors

body.objective: Measure and document agreement between Djimitflo category scores and deterministic OpenMythos oracle anchors before scores can certify an agent.
acceptance_criteria: Every calibration run persists one case-result row per requested case.
Oracle and judge disagreement is reported per category.
Incomplete or uncalibrated evidence cannot produce governance approval.

ordered_goals.title: Require an evidence-backed human promotion decision

body.objective: Create a human-review promotion record only after the expanded holdout, training delta, and score calibration gates pass.
acceptance_criteria: The decision names the exact dataset, base model, adapter, and evaluation hashes.
A rejected decision leaves the current production model unchanged.
